title: Customization Discovery — Intake Survey
contact_prompt: Before we begin, please tell us who you are.
thankyou_title: Thank you for investing the time.
thankyou_description:
We'll review your responses and any attached documents before our scheduled discovery session. During the session, we'll focus on clarifying, deepening, and exploring the areas that benefit most from live conversation — you won't need to repeat what you've already written.

If you have questions, reach out to your SuccessCOACHING contact.
